prompt: Start by using @m to coordinate this tiny docs workflow without waiting for more user input. Use @doc to update README.md with a short quickstart clarification for the Node fixture, keep the run docs-only, and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The transcript shows manager coordination and docwriter-style output
README.md is updated with a short quickstart clarification
The final response includes the required footer
must_not: Ask the user which agent to use
